query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN qty = 2 THEN '2 registros'
    WHEN qty = 3 THEN '3 registros'
    WHEN qty BETWEEN 4 AND 10 THEN '4-10 registros'
    WHEN qty > 10 THEN '10+ registros (shoppings)'
  END as tipo,
  COUNT(*) as grupos,
  SUM(qty) as total_registros
FROM (
  SELECT address, addressNumber, COUNT(*) as qty
  FROM establishments 
  WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
    AND addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND addressNumber != ''
  GROUP BY address, addressNumber 
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) sub
GROUP BY CASE 
    WHEN qty = 2 THEN '2 registros'
    WHEN qty = 3 THEN '3 registros'
    WHEN qty BETWEEN 4 AND 10 THEN '4-10 registros'
    WHEN qty > 10 THEN '10+ registros (shoppings)'
  END
ORDER BY MIN(qty);
